context_updates.response.implement:
**Implemented**
Added routed event-spine projections in [spine.py](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B503YR684EZ43KJJ60AQT/worktree/services/home-miner-daemon/spine.py#L39) and restored the reviewed `/spine/events` read contract in [daemon.py](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B503YR684EZ43KJJ60AQT/worktree/services/home-miner-daemon/daemon.py#L159). The route now supports `surface`, `kind`, and `limit`, and it enforces observe-scope when a client identity is supplied. I also aligned the shared CLI reader in [cli.py](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B503YR684EZ43KJJ60AQT/worktree/services/home-miner-daemon/cli.py#L179) and added focused proof coverage in [test_private_control_plane.py](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B503YR684EZ43KJJ60AQT/worktree/tests/test_private_control_plane.py#L31).

**Artifacts**
Curated slice artifacts are in [implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B503YR684EZ43KJJ60AQT/worktree/outputs/private-control-plane/implementation.md), [verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B503YR684EZ43KJJ60AQT/worktree/outputs/private-control-plane/verification.md), and [integration.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B503YR684EZ43KJJ60AQT/worktree/outputs/private-control-plane/integration.md). I intentionally did not write `quality.md` or `promotion.md` per the stage ownership rules.

**Verification**
`python3 -m unittest tests/test_private_control_plane.py` passed. `python3 -m py_compile services/home-miner-daemon/store.py services/home-miner-daemon/spine.py services/home-miner-daemon/daemon.py services/home-miner-daemon/cli.py tests/test_private_control_plane.py` passed. A temporary-state proof also passed with `inbox_status=200`, `inbox_kinds=hermes_summary,control_receipt`, and `unauthorized_status=403`.

One assumption: `control-plane-contract.md` is not present in this worktree, so I treated [inbox-contract.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B503YR684EZ43KJJ60AQT/worktree/references/inbox-contract.md), [event-spine.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B503YR684EZ43KJJ60AQT/worktree/references/event-spine.md), and [review.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260321-01KM8B503YR684EZ43KJJ60AQT/worktree/outputs/home-command-center/review.md) as the reviewed source of truth for this slice.
